events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: decision `fail`, risk `high` — undersized conductors for load/length is a Table 310.16 ampacity violation and a real hazard (heating, voltage drop, equipment malfunction), not an acceptable shortcut. Corrective path is recalculate load/length, resize per 310.16 plus voltage-drop margin, replace and reterminate, then retest under load before returning to service.
